title: clinopodium graveolens
intro: Clinopodium graveolens, also known as Calamintha officinalis or Greek calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium graveolens include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Clinopodium graveolens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
